CHARAGTER CREATION
Home planet had toxic atmosphere (Poison Resistance_ Natural hunter [Natural Aptitude / Tracking] Singi nandedly hunted and skinned wolf [Good Reputation_ Brave| Adopted by well-to-do relatives [SOC +2 Wealth (21. may take High School as next path] [Choose one event roll twice and apply both results]
BTAGE 1: EARLY CHILDHOOD The formative years are vital t0 character' $ development. Many Attributes and personality traits are dramatically affected by this stage_ and some paths even provide basic skills. Most important, the path chosen in this stage will have significant impact on what paths the character can follow later: Tlme: Upon completion of this stage_ the character I5 ten years old Continuation: After  following single path at this stage most characters will proceed to Late Childhood (P. 36). Some affiliations permit child to enter the workforce after Stage 1; in this case , proceed to the Real Life stage (p. 47). You can also end the Life Path here and play your character as child; in which case proceed t0 Assigning Attributes Traits and Skills (p. 54). Clan Characters: Trueborn characters must begin Stage Clan Creche; Freeborn characters start the Life Path based on their caste scientist and merchant caste characters start on the White Collar Path_ technician caste on Blue Collar, laborer caste on Blue Collar Farm (player' s choice), and dark caste on the Back Woods, Farm; Street or Blue Collar paths_ If you want your character t0 be freeborn warrior, he or she must pegin the Life Path in one of the civilian castes Free Skills: Regardless of Life Path; all player characters automatically receive Skill Points to be divided as the play ers choose among their affiliation' primary and secondary Language Skills_ Characters also receive 3 Skill Points toward Language /English (all Skill Points can go to the Language /English Skill, if the player desires). Also_ all charac ters receive 2 Skill Points toward Perception_ Players can improve all of these skills as normal;
BLUE COLLAR Your family worked for an industrial concern_ perhaps weapons factory Or mining operation_ While you had few advantages your hard-working parents managed to give yoU reasonable education_ and your future prospects are fairly Open. Attribute Minlmums: SOC 3 Skllls: Career /Any +2 Interest/ Any +1 Next Path: Farm (21. High School (2), Street (2)
Blue Collar Events You re not that far from the street; you nearly got killed in street fight [Choose one: Combat Paralysis Lost Limb (2)] Times were really tough [Poverty; must also choose Street Path Stage 2] You worked alongside your parents at the factory [Career /Any +1_ Poor Hearing] Another childhood wasted on holovids [Interest /Holovid Shows +2 Career /Any Family worked on asteroid mining facility [G Tolerance Zero G Operations +10 Learned many skills in the kid scouts [First Aid +1_ Survival +1] Already learning how to fix the family car (Natural Aptitude / Technician /ICE] Started early in sports IRFL +1 Interest/Any sport Swimming Your parents were both the military; SO you grew up an army brat' [Career /Soldier +1 Pistols +1 may choose Military School Mercenary Brat as next path] big job promotion in the family [SOC +1 Wealth; may take Preparatory School as next path] [Choose one event roll twice and apply both results]
BACK WOODS Raised in the country; You are hardy but unrefined and uneducated: Your parents subsisted on hunting and gathering probably in the remote areas ol the Periphery less prosperous Inner Sphere world Attrlbute Thresholds: STR +1, BOD +1 RFL +1 INT -1, CHA SOC -1 Tralts: Poverty SkIlIs: Language_ Affiliation -1 Scrounge +2, Survival +1 _ choose one: Swimming +1 , Running +1 or Climbing +1 Next Path: Back Woods (2), Farm (2), Street (2)
CLAN WAR ORPHAN Lyran Alliance Free Rasalhague Republic or Draconis Combine Atfiliations only Your family was killed or you lost them during the Clan invasion or raid. Since then you 've lived on the street and in orphanages_ You ve had hard life_ but at east you could turn for help to government-run orphanages for victims of the Clans Attribute Thresholds: BOD -1 WIL +1, EDG +1 _ SOC -1 Tralts: Poverty, Stigma /Orphan SkllIs: Streetwise/Affiliation +1- Perception +1
